properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All my words fall short I got nothing new How could I express All my gratitude?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I could sing these songs As I often do But every song must end And You never do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So I throw up my hands And praise You again and again 'Cause all that I have is a Hallelujah, hallelujah. And I know it's not much But I've nothing else fit for a King Except for a heart singing Hallelujah, hallelujah.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've got one response I've got just one move With my arm stretched wide I will worship You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come on, my soul Oh, don't you get shy on me Lift up your song 'Cause you've got a lion inside of those lungs Get up and praise the Lord!
